title: Did Tadej Pogačar Break Strade Bianche? His Dominance Forces Course Reset for Cycling’s Wildest Classic
content:
Pogačar crushed the monument-length Strade Bianche route, so organizers trimmed the brutal gravel race for the 2026 edition. Will it change the outcome Saturday?

Read the full article at Did Tadej Pogačar Break Strade Bianche? His Dominance Forces Course Reset for Cycling’s Wildest Classic on Velo.
author: ahood
